# Chris Hornak

> Marketing strategist helping business owners get found, stay found, and turn visibility into results.

## About

Chris Hornak is a marketing strategist based in Denver, Colorado with 20+ years of experience. He helps business owners — from local shops to scaling companies — build the strategy that makes everything else work. He founded Blog Hands (content marketing) and Swift Growth Marketing (full-service growth agency).

## What He Does

- Marketing strategy and diagnosis
- Website builds optimized for findability (search, AI, social, mobile, security, accessibility)
- Content strategy and execution (via Blog Hands)
- Full-service growth marketing (via Swift Growth Marketing)
- AI visibility, GEO, and AEO planning

## The Findability Check

Free tool at chrishornak.com/audit that scores any website across 7 findability signals: Search, AI, Structure, Social, Mobile, Security, and Accessibility. No signup required. Every site Chris builds scores 100.

- Guide 03 — AI Is Already Recommending Your Competitors: https://chrishornak.com/signal/ai-readiness
- Guide 04 — Your Reputation Is Strong. Your Website Doesn't Show It: https://chrishornak.com/signal/website-trust
- Guide 05 — Every Post You Publish Is Competing With Itself: https://chrishornak.com/signal/content-structure
- Guide 06 — You're Doing All the Right Things in the Wrong Order: https://chrishornak.com/signal/strategy-first
